prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第75名，近年排名稳定在70–75区间，属全国中上游理工类院校；该校在2021–2026年声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常数据中均未出现明显信号，舆情平稳，未见重大负面或正面事件影响报考心理；地质学、地 质资源与地质工程为该校传统优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据未收录），与招生专业中的地质学类、地质工程、资源勘查工程等高度对应，对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校物理类招生专业以地质地矿类、材料类、海洋科学类为主，这些专业大类在社会舆论中整体热度偏低（生化环材类明显劝退），可能降低部分考生报考意愿；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年明显增加，按历史比例估算物理类考生约20.38万（+6.1%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；该校位于北京 市，对福建省考生属跨省报考，无本省招生倾斜；福建省考生对北京高校整体地域偏好中等偏上。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15883名、2026年扩招约19%（位次数字增 大方向）与福建省物理类考生增加约6%（位次数字增大方向）的双向作用，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，但专业热度偏冷部分抵消扩招效应；预测2026年最低位次约17728名，区间172 28–18228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16670 → 15942 → 16896 → 15967 → 15883, fluctuating within the 15800–16900 range, with a slight forward trend in recent 3 years (decreasing ranking numbers). The baseline for 2025 is about 15883. The enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province Physics Category was 30 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 40 in 2024, 42 in 2025, and planned 50 in 2026, an expansion of about 19% compared to 2025. The significant increase in enrollment quotas theoretically eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 70–75 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering institutions in China. From 2021 to 2026, there were no significant signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission data; public opinion is stable, with no major negative or positive events affecting application psychology. Geology, Geological Resources, and Geological Engineering are its traditional advantageous disciplines (fifth round discipline evaluation data not included), highly corresponding to majors such as Geology, Geological Engineering, and Resource Exploration Engineering, providing stable attraction for students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category majors offered by this university are mainly in geology, mining, materials, and marine sciences. These major categories generally have low popularity in public opinion (biochemistry, environmental, materials, and chemical engineering are notably discouraged), which may reduce some students' willingness to apply. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province is about 267,900, a significant increase from 2025. Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 203,800 (+6.1%), intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The university is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Fujian candidates, with no local enrollment preference. Fujian candidates have a moderately high overall regional preference for Beijing universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 15883, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 19% (direction of increasing ranking numbers), and the increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates by about 6% (direction of increasing ranking numbers), the expansion magnitude is greater than the candidate increase, but the low popularity of majors partially offsets the expansion effect. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 17728, with a range of 17228–18228.

This university is characterized by geosciences, with traditional advantageous majors like Geology and Geological Engineering offering high cost-performance, suitable for candidates interested in geology and mining directions.
